title: Tainia longiscapa
taxonomy: Tainia longiscapa is classified as a species within the family Orchidaceae. This genus belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae. The subfamily Epidendroideae is part of the order Asparagales. Asparagales is a large order within the monocot clade of flowering plants. Tainia longiscapa is a rare and endemic species found in Southeast Asia.
